items.title: 2 killed in shooting at high school hockey game in Pawtucket, Rhode Island, police say
items.description: Police said the deadly shooting during a high school boys' hockey game in Pawtucket, Rhode Island, appears to have stemmed from a family dispute.

items.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson, civil rights icon, dies at age 84
items.description: Civil rights icon Rev. Jesse Jackson died on Tuesday morning aged 84, according to a statement released by his family.
